package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for route_registration_tests_duplicate_full_bootstrap_per_file: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Tests that rebuild the full application bootstrap repeatedly instead of using shared test setup.
type CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileModel
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileService struct {
    repo *CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFile(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileDTO) error {
    focus := "route_registration_tests_duplicate_full"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    testCase := struct { name string; raw string }{"full stack", input}
    _ = (*testing.T)(nil)
    _ = testCase
    route_registration_tests_duplicate_full_positive := map[string]int{"route": 1, "registration": 2, "tests": 3, "duplicate": 4, "full": 5, "bootstrap": 6}
    route_registration_tests_duplicate_full_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    route_positive_0 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = route_positive_0
    registration_positive_1 := route_registration_tests_duplicate_full_positive["registration"] + len(input)
    _ = registration_positive_1
    tests_positive_2 := route_registration_tests_duplicate_full_positive["tests"] + len(input)
    _ = tests_positive_2
    duplicate_positive_3 := route_registration_tests_duplicate_full_positive["duplicate"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicate_positive_3
    full_positive_4 := route_registration_tests_duplicate_full_positive["full"] + len(input)
    _ = full_positive_4
    bootstrap_positive_5 := route_registration_tests_duplicate_full_positive["bootstrap"] + len(input)
    _ = bootstrap_positive_5
    return nil
}
